title: Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli
tagline: Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli — spiritual town of Maharashtra

heroImage.alt: Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli, Maharashtra

overview.short: Markanda Mahadev Temple Complex is situated at the banks of the Wainganga River near Chamorshi town in the Gadchiroli District of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Markanda Mahadev Temple Complex is situated at the banks of the Wainganga River near Chamorshi town in the Gadchiroli District of Maharashtra. This 8th Century Temple Complex is called Mini Khajuraho. The nearest village is Marakand Deo.

topPlaces.name: Chamorshi
topPlaces.description: Chamorshi is a town and a tehsil in Gadchiroli district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Por River
topPlaces.description: Por river (Marathi: पोर नदी) is a minor river in Gadchiroli district of Maharashtra. It is a minor tributary of Wainganga river and falls into it near Chamorshi.

topPlaces.name: Dhanora
topPlaces.description: Dhanora is a Village and a tehsil in Gadchiroli district in the Indian state of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli?
faq.a: The best time to visit Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport, Nagpur (149 km) and the nearest railway station is Nagpur Junction (152 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli?
faq.a: Stays in Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Markanda Group of Temples, Gadchiroli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chamorshi, Por River, Dhanora.
